name: mas-governance
description:
Governed Multi-Agent Delivery System (MAS) over MCP.

Aliases: @mas, mas-governance, MAS.

Use this plugin to run, resume, and inspect governed MAS projects from Codex: intake, planning, capability/HR, formal handoffs, evaluation, training, knowledge search, and observability. It connects to the same provider-agnostic mas-server engine that Claude Code uses (the d-009 'one core, many surfaces' North Star), so Codex becomes a first-class surface over the MAS.

For requests like 'start a governed MAS project', 'resume the MAS project', or 'show pending MAS handoffs', use the mas_* MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Runs the MAS governance engine (60-tool mas-server MCP) and operator skills inside Codex. Drive governed project state — intake, planning, handoffs, evaluation, training, knowledge, observability — over the same core Claude Code uses.
defaultPrompt: Show the MAS roster and any active projects.
Resume the current MAS project from its checkpoint.
Show pending MAS handoffs and the next action.
